title: Brazilian Dreamy Lasagna
description: A rich and creamy Brazilian-inspired lasagna dish, packed with dreamy flavors and dense textures.
instructions: Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, combine the dreamy sauce and dense ricotta.
Stir until well combined and heated through.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Brazilian cheese and salt.
Add the cooked lasagna noodles to the skillet with the dreamy sauce mixture.
Spoon the Brazilian cheese mixture on top of the lasagna noodles.
Repeat the layers one more time, finishing with a layer of dreamy sauce.
Top with additional Brazilian cheese and fresh parsley.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
